title: Assistant explains twin graph confidence
given: The demo tenant has twin entity snapshots, edges, scenario drafts, and at least one open risk signal.
then: The assistant shows a graph confidence score from real entity, edge, scenario, and risk counts.
The page lists graph gaps such as missing relationship coverage or open risk acknowledgement blockers.
The summary is evidence-first and does not claim the graph is complete when edges are sparse.

title: Assistant creates a what-if scenario draft from a prompt
given: The operator enters a what-if prompt and optionally links an open twin risk signal.
when: The operator clicks Create scenario insight.
then: A SupplyChainTwinScenarioDraft is created with AMP10_TWIN_ASSISTANT draft JSON.
A SupplyChainTwinAssistantInsight links the prompt, graph score, scenario draft, optional risk signal, assistant evidence, and action queue item.
An AssistantAuditEvent and AssistantEvidenceRecord are written for traceability.
No twin entity, edge, shipment, order, supplier, inventory, or finance record is mutated silently.

title: Risk signal becomes reviewable assistant work
given: An unacknowledged Supply Chain Twin risk signal exists.
when: The assistant creates a scenario insight linked to that risk.
then: The UI shows review playbook copy for the risk signal.
The action queue contains review_twin_scenario work linked to the created scenario.
The operator can close the assistant insight after review without acknowledging the risk automatically.
